ad_name: Asiakastarina: Tuntuvat paremmilta kuin 500€ lasit — Naiset 45-54

structure.note: Single-image animation with UGC handheld feel. Product reference photos used for accurate product appearance. Kling 2.5 Turbo Pro for motion.

avatar_prompt: Photorealistic portrait of a Finnish/Nordic woman, age 50, natural light blonde shoulder-length hair typical Scandinavian style, wearing a soft cream-white knit sweater. Warm genuine smile showing slight surprise, kind light blue Nordic eyes, fair skin with natural freckles. Soft natural daylight from a kitchen window in a cozy Finnish home. Shallow depth of field, creamy warm bokeh. Shot on professional camera, detailed skin texture, minimal natural makeup. Upper body framing, looking directly at camera. 9:16 vertical portrait orientation. High-end lifestyle photography.

talking_head.full_script: Mä maksoin ennen yli viissataa euroa laseista. Sit mä löysin Banaanin. Kahdet lasit, yheksällä kympillä. Nää tuntuu paremmilta ku ne ylihinnotellut viidensadan euron lasit. Ja näiden Hinta-laatusuhde on loistava. Kokeile itekin, banaanieyewear.fi.

script_breakdown.line: Mä maksoin ennen yli viissataa euroa laseista.
Nää tuntuu paremmilta ku ne ylihinnotellut viidensadan euron lasit.

broll_clips.image_prompt: A pair of premium eyeglasses on a glass shelf inside a bright optician store. Cold white fluorescent lighting. Glass display cases in background. The glasses sit on a clear perspex display stand. Sterile expensive retail atmosphere. Shot from slightly below eye level as if browsing the display. Phone camera style, slightly imperfect handheld angle. No people. No text, no branding. 9:16 vertical.
broll_clips.motion_prompt: Handheld camera slowly pans across the display shelf, slight natural camera shake as if someone is filming with their phone while walking past, fluorescent light reflections shift on the glass

broll_clips.image_prompt: An open small brown cardboard shipping box on a light wooden kitchen table, with a black glasses case visible inside. Warm morning sunlight from a window. Cozy Nordic Scandinavian home interior. A cup of coffee sits nearby. Overhead angle as if filming with phone held above the table. Casual unboxing moment. Phone camera style. No people visible. No text, no logos. 9:16 vertical.
broll_clips.motion_prompt: Handheld overhead camera gently moves closer to the open package, natural slight wobble of someone filming an unboxing with their phone, warm cozy lighting

broll_clips.image_prompt: Two pairs of eyeglasses matching the reference photos laid side by side on a soft white linen cloth. Natural warm morning light from the right. Clean flat-lay composition. Top-down overhead angle as if someone placed their phone above to take a photo. Warm tones, casual styling. Phone camera style. No people. No text, no branding. 9:16 vertical.
broll_clips.motion_prompt: Slight handheld movement as someone films both pairs of glasses from above, gentle natural drift with subtle phone camera shake, warm morning light plays across the lenses

broll_clips.image_prompt: Close-up of the exact eyeglasses from the reference photo resting open on a warm wooden table. Soft natural daylight creating gentle shadows. The glasses frame details are clearly visible. Shallow depth of field with warm bokeh. Shot from a low angle as if someone put their phone down on the table to film. Casual intimate product shot. Phone camera style. No people. No text, no branding. 9:16 vertical.
broll_clips.motion_prompt: Slow handheld camera movement around the glasses, natural phone filming motion as if picking up and admiring the frame, gentle organic camera sway with warm light

broll_clips.image_prompt: Detailed close-up of the exact eyeglasses from the reference photo, focusing on the hinge area and frame craftsmanship. The glasses are held at an angle against a warm blurred background. Natural warm side light catching the metal details and frame finish. Macro-style detail shot as if filming close-up with phone camera. Phone camera style. No people. No text, no branding. 9:16 vertical.
broll_clips.motion_prompt: Very gentle handheld micro-movements as someone films the glasses detail with their phone close-up, subtle focus breathing, natural warm light catching metal reflections

broll_clips.image_prompt: Lifestyle flat-lay: the exact eyeglasses from the reference photo on an open book, next to a steaming coffee cup on a cozy cream knit blanket. Small green plant nearby. Soft warm afternoon window light. Nordic hygge atmosphere. Overhead phone camera angle. Casual cozy lifestyle feel. Phone camera style. No people. No text, no branding. 9:16 vertical.
broll_clips.motion_prompt: Gentle lazy overhead drift as someone casually films the cozy scene with their phone, slight handheld wobble, warm inviting atmosphere

broll_clips.image_prompt: Three pairs of stylish eyeglasses from the reference photos arranged casually on a clean white marble surface with a small succulent plant and coffee cup. Bright morning window light. Aspirational but casual flat-lay composition. Overhead angle as if phone held above. Phone camera style. No people. No text, no branding. 9:16 vertical.
